description:
A marriage swindler who can make most people fall head over heels in under 30 seconds. This scammer has an unparalleled sense of fashion and lazes around at home on days off. Because of a long time spent being destitute, Mei will eat anything, and Mei even lived off of free meals from dates for three whole weeks. Mei`s home is cramped and packed with stuff. This con artist also has a big secret.
Source: Viz
name: Kinosaki Mei
